form.label: DNS-collector Overview (A/B vs Vector) — mi_dhcp
form.description: Splunk port of the Grafana "DNS-collector Overview (+ A/B vs Vector)" board, reading the POC index=mi_dhcp text path. Both receivers feed in side by side: source=dnstap:vector (port 6000) and source=dnstap:dnscollector (port 6001). Fields are rex-extracted at search time from the NIOS-style line, handling CLIENT_* and RESOLVER_* legs, so this works whether or not props/transforms are defined. Default DNS leg = client-facing so QPS is not inflated by the resolver leg.

search.query: index=mi_dhcp $srcfilter$ | rex "(?<operation>(?:CLIENT|RESOLVER|AUTH|FORWARDER)_(?:QUERY|RESPONSE))" | eval operation=coalesce(operation, if(match(_raw,"response:"),"CLIENT_RESPONSE","CLIENT_QUERY")) | eval evt=if(match(operation,"_RESPONSE$"),"response","query"), leg=lower(replace(operation,"_(QUERY|RESPONSE)$","")) | where $legwhere$ AND evt="query" | stats count as q earliest(_time) as a latest(_time) as b | eval QPS=round(q/max(b-a,1),2) | fields QPS

index=mi_dhcp $srcfilter$ | rex "(?<operation>(?:CLIENT|RESOLVER|AUTH|FORWARDER)_(?:QUERY|RESPONSE))" | eval operation=coalesce(operation, if(match(_raw,"response:"),"CLIENT_RESPONSE","CLIENT_QUERY")) | eval evt=if(match(operation,"_RESPONSE$"),"response","query"), leg=lower(replace(operation,"_(QUERY|RESPONSE)$","")) | where $legwhere$ AND evt="response" | stats count as r earliest(_time) as a latest(_time) as b | eval RPS=round(r/max(b-a,1),2) | fields RPS

index=mi_dhcp $srcfilter$ | rex "(?<operation>(?:CLIENT|RESOLVER|AUTH|FORWARDER)_(?:QUERY|RESPONSE))" | eval operation=coalesce(operation, if(match(_raw,"response:"),"CLIENT_RESPONSE","CLIENT_QUERY")) | eval evt=if(match(operation,"_RESPONSE$"),"response","query"), leg=lower(replace(operation,"_(QUERY|RESPONSE)$","")) | rex "(?:_RESPONSE\s+|response:\s+)(?<rcode>[A-Z]+)" | where $legwhere$ AND evt="response" AND rcode="NXDOMAIN" | stats count as n earliest(_time) as a latest(_time) as b | eval NXPS=round(n/max(b-a,1),3) | fields NXPS

panel.title: A/B QPS — Vector vs DNS-collector (whichever the NIOS member feeds)

search.query: index=mi_dhcp $srcfilter$ | rex "(?<operation>(?:CLIENT|RESOLVER|AUTH|FORWARDER)_(?:QUERY|RESPONSE))" | eval operation=coalesce(operation, if(match(_raw,"response:"),"CLIENT_RESPONSE","CLIENT_QUERY")) | eval evt=if(match(operation,"_RESPONSE$"),"response","query"), leg=lower(replace(operation,"_(QUERY|RESPONSE)$","")) | where $legwhere$ AND evt="query" | eval receiver=case(source="dnstap:vector","Vector",source="dnstap:dnscollector","DNS-collector",true(),source) | timechart span=$span$ count by receiver | foreach * [eval <<FIELD>>=round('<<FIELD>>'/_span,2)] | fields - _span

index=mi_dhcp $srcfilter$ | rex "(?<operation>(?:CLIENT|RESOLVER|AUTH|FORWARDER)_(?:QUERY|RESPONSE))" | eval operation=coalesce(operation, if(match(_raw,"response:"),"CLIENT_RESPONSE","CLIENT_QUERY")) | eval evt=if(match(operation,"_RESPONSE$"),"response","query"), leg=lower(replace(operation,"_(QUERY|RESPONSE)$","")) | rex "(?:_RESPONSE\s+|response:\s+)(?<rcode>[A-Z]+)" | where $legwhere$ AND evt="response" | timechart span=$span$ count by rcode

index=mi_dhcp $srcfilter$ | rex "(?<operation>(?:CLIENT|RESOLVER|AUTH|FORWARDER)_(?:QUERY|RESPONSE))" | eval operation=coalesce(operation, if(match(_raw,"response:"),"CLIENT_RESPONSE","CLIENT_QUERY")) | eval evt=if(match(operation,"_RESPONSE$"),"response","query"), leg=lower(replace(operation,"_(QUERY|RESPONSE)$","")) | rex "query:\s+\S+\s+IN\s+(?<qtype>[A-Z0-9]+)" | where $legwhere$ AND evt="query" | timechart span=$span$ count by qtype | foreach * [eval <<FIELD>>=round('<<FIELD>>'/_span,2)] | fields - _span

index=mi_dhcp $srcfilter$ | rex "(?<operation>(?:CLIENT|RESOLVER|AUTH|FORWARDER)_(?:QUERY|RESPONSE))" | eval operation=coalesce(operation, if(match(_raw,"response:"),"CLIENT_RESPONSE","CLIENT_QUERY")) | eval evt=if(match(operation,"_RESPONSE$"),"response","query"), leg=lower(replace(operation,"_(QUERY|RESPONSE)$","")) | rex "query:\s+(?<qname>\S+)\s+IN" | where $legwhere$ AND evt="query" | top limit=10 qname showperc=false

panel.title: Events by DNS server (dnstap identity — token before "named[")

search.query: index=mi_dhcp $srcfilter$ | rex "(?<dns_server>\S+)\s+named\[" | stats count by dns_server

index=mi_dhcp $srcfilter$ | rex "(?<operation>(?:CLIENT|RESOLVER|AUTH|FORWARDER)_(?:QUERY|RESPONSE))" | eval operation=coalesce(operation, if(match(_raw,"response:"),"CLIENT_RESPONSE","CLIENT_QUERY")) | eval evt=if(match(operation,"_RESPONSE$"),"response","query"), leg=lower(replace(operation,"_(QUERY|RESPONSE)$","")) | rex "client\s+(?<client>\d{1,3}(?:\.\d{1,3}){3})" | where $legwhere$ AND evt="query" | top limit=10 client showperc=false
